generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring electrical current drawn by the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor on the first axis of MABI MAX 100."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder providing angular position of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor on the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox position encoder giving angular position of the cycloidal gearbox of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]
instance MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]
instance GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor current (A) transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]
instance MotorPositionAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor angle (rad) transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]
instance GearboxPositionAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of gearbox angle (rad) transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real‑time transmission of sensor data streams (motor current, motor and gearbox angles) to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService, OnlineModelAdaptationService, DecisionSupportService
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML toolchain enabling model definition and analysis of the first axis mechanisms."
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelService
]
instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink runtime enabling simulation models of motor, gearbox, and friction."
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorSimulationService, GearboxSimulationService, FrictionSimulationService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing semantic integration between the digital twin and enterprise systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticIntegrationService
]
instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard platform for real‑time visualization of joint behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural and behavioral model of the first axis, documenting the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, gear transmission, cycloidal gearbox, and dual encoders."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model of the gear transmission and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance FrictionSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model of joint friction, used for parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model performing torque, angular velocity, and acceleration derivations from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real‑time dashboards of joint angle, torque, angular velocity, and acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:provides JointVisualizationInsight
]
instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service conducting continuous joint friction identification using white‑box and black‑box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateInsight, WearBacklashDetectionInsight, RecalibrateFrictionModelAction
]
instance OnlineModelAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling online adaptation of control models for improved motion performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAdjustmentRecommendationInsight, AdjustControlAction
]
instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing maintenance scheduling and trajectory replanning recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceSchedulingInsight, TrajectoryReplanningInsight, ScheduleMaintenanceAction, ReplanTrajectoryAction
]
instance EngineeringModelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing the SysML engineering model to support design decisions."
    DTDFVocab:provides EngineeringModelInsight
]
instance MotorSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service running the motor simulation model to generate performance predictions."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorSimulationInsight
]
instance GearboxSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing the gearbox simulation model to evaluate mechanical behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides GearboxSimulationInsight
]
instance FrictionSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating joint friction dynamics for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionSimulationInsight
]
instance SemanticIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service exposing digital twin data via Asset Administration Shell for enterprise integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides SemanticIntegrationInsight
]

instance JointVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of joint kinematic and dynamic variables in real time."
]
instance FrictionParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated joint friction model parameters derived from continuous online identification."
]
instance WearBacklashDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear or backlash changes in the gear mechanisms."
]
instance ControlAdjustmentRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for control parameter adjustments to improve motion performance."
]
instance MaintenanceSchedulingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation to schedule maintenance based on friction trends and wear detection."
]
instance TrajectoryReplanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation to replan motion trajectories to avoid wear‑prone or high‑friction zones."
]
instance EngineeringModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of the SysML structural model to guide design and process decisions."
]
instance MotorSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics."
]
instance GearboxSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results of the gear transmission and cycloidal gearbox."
]
instance FrictionSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results of joint friction dynamics."
]
instance SemanticIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic exposure of digital twin data via Asset Administration Shell."
]

instance RecalibrateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recalibration of the joint friction model when significant deviations are detected."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control gains to compensate for identified friction changes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ScheduleMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Schedule maintenance task based on maintenance scheduling insight."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ReplanTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically replan motion trajectory to avoid high‑friction zones."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous stream of data with near‑instantaneous processing. The computational models run at the same rate or faster than the sensor updates to enable on‑the‑fly friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation comprises the physical asset (robot axis), an engineering model, simulation and data‑calculation models, a processing component that generates derived data, a dashboard for user interaction, and an AAS that links all components in a semantically coherent architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin spans the ideal (design/simulation) phase through the operated phase. Simulation models represent the ideal physics; live sensor data captures the manufacturing/operated reality, enabling continuous model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High traceability between data traces and the models that generated them. Continuous comparison of simulated and measured signals validates the friction models. Uncertainties from load, temperature, and wear are considered by combining white‑box and black‑box approaches, with ongoing data‑driven refinement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live sensor data transmitted from the robot to the twin via MQTT, a lightweight publish/subscribe protocol typically running over TCP/IP."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shell (AAS) following the IEC/ISO standard for digital twins; SysML modeling adhering to ISO/IEC 15926 adaptation; simulation models based on MATLAB/Simulink which follows standard engineering modeling practices."
]
